title: Nursery Rhyme. DXIII. Natural History.
content:
Pussy-cat, pussy-cat, where have you been?
        I've been up to London to look at the queen.
        Pussy-cat, pussy-cat, what did you there?
        I frighten'd a little mouse under the chair.
meaning:
"Nursery Rhyme. DXIII. Natural History." is a quintessential example of Unknown's signature style...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
